violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked chili) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Deli meat/cheese was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit above the fill line in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC relocated items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Establishment is using Time as a Public health control for calzones without approval. Inspector provided application. PIC completed application during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -deli slicer -prep unit hinges. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
